headline: Is Constellation Brands' Focus on Core Brands the Key to Success?
summary: STZ leans on premium beer, wine and spirits brands like Modelo and Kim Crawford, using innovation and premiumization to fuel growth and market share.

headline: How CEO Transition Amid Softer Demand At Constellation Brands (STZ) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: Constellation Brands has appointed Nicholas Fink as its new CEO, succeeding Bill Newlands on April 13, with Newlands remaining briefly as a strategic advisor to support the transition. This leadership change comes as the company contends with softer alcohol demand, particularly among Hispanic consumers, raising questions about how management will respond to these pressures. We will now examine how Fink’s appointment, and his existing boardroom experience, could influence Constellation...
